import React, { Component } from "react"; import { TabLink, Tabs, TabContent } from "react-tabs-redux"; import { Grid, Paper, Box, Card, CardContent, CardMedia, Typography, } from "@material-ui/core"; import { makeStyles } from "@material-ui/core/styles"; import { sizing } from "@material-ui/system"; class Interests extends Component { interest1 = ( sdf ); render() { if(this.props.data){ var interests = this.props.data.interests; console.log(interests); } return (
StarLink Car AutoPilot Sports {this.interest1} {interests.title} sdf...
); } } export default Interests;
